description_long: This object is a large, wedge-shaped piece of Swiss-style cheese with a pale yellow color and a smooth, slightly glossy surface. The cheese features several round holes of varying sizes, known as 'eyes,' distributed across its faces, giving it a classic Emmental appearance. The triangular prism shape is well-defined, with sharp edges and flat surfaces, and the holes penetrate through the sides and top. The surface appears clean and unblemished, with no visible rind or packaging. The cheese is solid, with the holes revealing a consistent interior texture. Its size and finish suggest it is an oversized, stylized representation rather than a typical edible portion.
description: A large, wedge-shaped Swiss cheese with a smooth, pale yellow surface and multiple round holes throughout. The cheese is solid and clean, with no rind or packaging visible.
description_view_0: This view shows the broad, flat top of the cheese wedge with three visible holes and a smooth, glossy surface.
description_view_1: The pointed end of the wedge is visible, highlighting the triangular shape and showing multiple holes on the side faces.
description_view_2: The opposite side of the wedge is shown, with a large hole near the edge and several smaller holes visible on the side.
description_view_3: The back face of the wedge is visible, displaying two large holes and the flat, even surface of the cheese.
